item.title: The brainrot lore is getting out of hand Which Italian brainrot character are you? The Cappuccino Assassino or Bombardino Crocodillo? Watch till the end for the full Tung Tung Sahur compilation! #brainrot #italianbrainrot #aistory #tungtungtungsahur #cap
